positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a cosmic forest landscape. The scene features bioluminescent flora and crystalline trees glowing in various shades of electric blue, deep indigo, and vibrant cyan. In the foreground, a central silhouette of a graceful fox is sitting amidst glowing moss and glowing crystal shards. The style should be minimalist digital art with strong vector lines and high contrast, similar to a modern woodcut print. The composition must be central and balanced, ideal for a t-shirt print. Utilize strong rim lighting to outline the subjects against a deep space background. High saturation, smooth edges, perfect for screen printing.
